question: What is the composition of the natural wonder of planet Ntunu?

answers.ground_truth: The 'Floating Islands of Aeridia' are primarily composed of 'Aeridium Ore'.
answers.original: The Floating Islands of Aeridia are natural landmasses that drift high above the world's surface in the upper atmosphere.
answers.perturbed: The Floating Islands of Aeridia are primarily composed of Aeridium Ore, which provides their buoyancy.

ops.description: The Chrono-Regulator was created by the Forgotten Civilization.
The Etherean Soul-Compass allows navigation through Astral-Currents.
A Florpion day lasts exactly 26 Earth hours.

entities.name: Ntulu
entities.description: Ntulu is a planet known for its natural wonders, including the Floating Islands of Aeridia.

entities.name: Floating Islands of Aeridia
entities.description: The Floating Islands of Aeridia are natural landmasses that drift high above the world's surface in the upper atmosphere.<SEP>The Floating Islands of Aeridia are natural wonders on planet Ntulu, drifting high above the world's surface in the upper atmosphere.

entities.name: Florpion
entities.description: Florpion is a planet with unique atmospheric and geological characteristics.

entities.name: Aethelia
entities.description: Aethelia is a rocky planet in the K'tharr System's habitable zone, possessing liquid water.<SEP>Aethelia is a rocky planet in the K'tharr System's habitable zone, possessing liquid water.

entities.name: K'tharr System
entities.description: The K'tharr System is a star system containing seven planets and located in a sparse region of the galaxy.<SEP>The K'tharr System is a star system containing seven planets, including gas giants and rocky worlds.

relations.description: The Floating Islands of Aeridia are a natural wonder located on the planet Ntulu.
Kryponite particles in Florpion's atmosphere cause the sky to appear chartreuse.
A Florpion day lasts exactly 26 Earth hours.
Florpion's continents float on a liquid mantle.
Florpionians are native to Florpion and communicate through bioluminescence.
Florpion's oceans are composed of liquid ammonia.
Florpion's gravity is 0.8 times that of Earth.
Aethelia is a rocky planet in the habitable zone of the K'tharr System.<SEP>Aethelia is a rocky planet in the K'tharr System.
Florpion's unique atmospheric composition causes its sky to appear chartreuse due to light refraction.
The first Florpionian city was built underwater.

entities.name: Vortex Corp
entities.description: Vortex Corp is the developer of Project Nebula and the QuantumLeap framework, and it also manages Project Chimera.

entities.name: Guardian Orb
entities.description: A Xylotian drone designed to emit a kinetic pulse and generate disorienting light patterns to repel and confuse threats.

entities.name: Cyclone-Steel
entities.description: Cyclone-Steel is a material that naturally curves in helical patterns and is formed during atmospheric storms.

entities.name: Aeridium Ore
entities.description: Aeridium Ore is a lightweight, crystalline mineral found only in atmospheric veins, providing buoyancy to the Floating Islands of Aeridia.<SEP>Aeridium Ore is a naturally buoyant, lightweight, and crystalline mineral found only in atmospheric veins on Ntulu.

The Floating Islands of Aeridia are primarily composed of Aeridium Ore, which provides their buoyancy.<SEP>Aeridium Ore allows the Floating Islands of Aeridia to move slowly across the sky and is considered sacred by many cultures.<SEP>The Floating Islands of Aeridia are primarily composed of Aeridium Ore, which provides buoyancy.
